meaning: n.踏木,踏板vi.踏动踏板,开动vt.踩踏板操作(机器等)
examples: So they are using their treadle pumps again.
He told me that the treadle pump was a gift from God.
Men with treadle pumps often no longer have to leave the farm to seek extra work in cities.
In 1480, Leonardo Da Vinci designed a lathe powered by foot treadle, which allowed for constant rotation.
Greenberg and her team of students travelled to Burma, and devised a cheap and efficient treadle pump that looks like a Stairmaster, which the farmer steps on in order to extract water.
